rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when they refer to component ports
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for AGREE contract syntax
generic_rules: Align helper declaration types with actual expression types in AGREE
Avoid encoding AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless typed ports or constants are exposed
Omit Boolean range comparisons unless the port is explicitly an AGREE bool in scope
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL property names like Compute_Execution_Time as AGREE variables
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers for range comparisons
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing parameters
Implementation-level bindings and subcomponent port usage
Model fusion and owner/scope preservation rules
